All findings documented in wiki. Architecture defined, files restructured for OpenClaw. 15 metacognition principles extracted. 12 of 15 rule violations resolved.

key_files: SOUL.md - Identity + 15 metacognition principles (loaded first every session)
AGENTS.md - Operating manual with Change Impact Protocol
HANDOFF.md - Full context transfer with WHY behind every decision
wiki/openclaw-setup.md - Complete installation reference with all component configs
wiki/memory-architecture.md - Memory design (Obsidian-compatible vault + SQLite + tiered loading)
critical_principles: Research before action — understand the target before touching infrastructure
Every change cascades — trace downstream impacts recursively
The community is the architect, not you
Memory is the moat — models are swappable, knowledge compounds
Eat your own cooking — follow your own rules
